title: Boat Rental in Key West: 2026 Prices, Tips & Where to Set Off
html:
For a self-guided exploration of the Florida Keys, renting a boat in Key West opens up the turquoise waters of the Gulf of Mexico and the Atlantic. Prices for a half-day powerboat start around $350 USD, and you can compare verified listings on BoatHire24 before you travel.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Key West?

Prices start around $150 USD per person for a shared tour and rise to $1,200 USD for a full-day crewed yacht. A half-day motorboat without a skipper typically costs between $350 and $600 USD. Catamaran charters for groups of six often run $800 to $1,200 for a full day. You can book a charter online through the platform’s secure booking system.

Where to set off in Key West

Key West has several well-equipped marinas and launch points. Garrison Bight Marina is a good starting point for skippered charters and boat rentals. Key West Bight, also known as the Historic Seaport, offers access to sailing catamarans and fishing boats. For a quieter departure, consider Geiger Key Marina, which is a short drive from the centre. Nearby islands such as Sunset Key and Wisteria Island are popular stops within a few nautical miles. Many boaters also head to the Marquesas Keys, a group of uninhabited islands about twenty miles west.

Which boat to rent

  1. Bowrider, Great for couples or small families exploring Sand Key; seats up to six people; from $400 USD for a half-day.
  2. Catamaran, Ideal for stable cruising to the Marquesas; accommodates up to twelve guests; from $850 USD for a full day.
  3. Centre console fishing boat, Perfect for anglers heading to the reef; holds up to eight people; from $500 USD for a half-day.
  4. Luxury yacht, such as an Azimut or Sunseeker, For a premium experience with a skipper; capacity of eight to ten guests; from $1,500 USD for a full day.
  5. Pontoon boat, Easy to handle and ideal for a leisurely cruise around Key West Bight; seats up to ten; from $350 USD for a half-day.

If you prefer a speedy option, this speedboat is available for hire on BoatHire24 and can reach the reef in under twenty minutes.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Key West?

No licence is required in Florida, but operators must be at least 18 years old and complete a brief safety briefing. The rental company will confirm the exact requirements when you reserve. Most skippered charters include a captain who holds the relevant qualifications.

Try a sunset cruise from Key West Bight: you will see the famous green flash as the sun dips below the Gulf of Mexico.

Costs at a glance

  • Price range: $150 to $1,500 USD per person or per boat
  • Peak months: December to April and July to August
  • Common trip length: 4 to 8 hours
  • Typical capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: USD

Questions about boat rental in Key West

Can I rent a boat without a captain in Key West?

Yes, many rental companies allow you to take a boat out without a skipper if you are 18 or older and show basic boating knowledge.

What is the best time of year for boating in Key West?

The best conditions are from March to May and October to November, when the weather is warm and the wind is light.

How far is the reef from Key West?

The nearest coral reef is about six nautical miles offshore, a journey of roughly 30 minutes in a fast boat.

Are there picnic spots accessible only by boat?

Yes, Sunset Key and Wisteria Island both have beaches where you can moor and enjoy a picnic away from the crowds.

Before you travel in 2026, compare boat models and availability on BoatHire24. If you own a boat in Key West, you can also browse the listings to see how to become a host on the platform. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Key West or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Key West and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
